IraCPA API
IraCPA API

bridgecalls

Bridge Calls

POST
/api/bridgecalls

Bridge Calls › Request Body

BridgeCalls
first_uuid
​string · required
second_uuid
​string · required

Bridge Calls › Responses

Request processed successfully

No data returned
POST/api/bridgecalls
curl --request POST \ --url /api/bridgecalls \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data ' { "first_uuid": "first_uuid", "second_uuid": "second_uuid" } '
Example Request Body
{ "first_uuid": "first_uuid", "second_uuid": "second_uuid" }
json
Example Responses
{ "status_code": 0, "status": "OK" }
json
application/json
stopstreamtransfercall
